metadata.title: Mosaiko — Custom Photo Fridge Magnets
metadata.description: Turn your favorite photos into magnetic fridge mosaics. Choose your design, upload your photo, and get your magnets delivered.

announcement.text: Free shipping on all orders — Customize your magnets today!

hero.title: Your photo, your magnets
hero.subtitle: Transform any image into a unique magnetic mosaic for your fridge

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Create your custom magnets in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select your mosaic size: 3, 4, 6, or 9 pieces
howItWorks.step2Desc: Take a photo or select one from your gallery and adjust it
howItWorks.step3Desc: We print and ship your custom magnets straight to your door

trustBadges.qualityDesc: High-resolution printing on durable magnetic material
trustBadges.shippingDesc: Delivered anywhere in Mexico at no extra cost
trustBadges.satisfactionDesc: If you don't love it, we'll refund your money
trustBadges.secureDesc: Card, OXXO, or bank transfer — your data always protected

ctaBanner.title: Ready to create your magnets?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Design a unique magnetic mosaic with your favorite photo

builder.title: Customize your magnets
builder.subtitle: Create a unique magnetic mosaic with your favorite photo
builder.grid9Desc: 3×3 mosaic — the favorite for large photos
builder.previewHint: Preview of how your magnets will look on the fridge

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyHint: Add custom magnets or browse our catalog!

footer.tagline: Transform your memories into magnetic art
